task:
Krita is open with /home/user/Documents/plugin_test.kra loaded.

Enable the 'Ten Brushes' Python plugin so the change is persisted to `~/.config/kritarc` under the `[python]` section as `Enable tenbrushes=true`.

Save the file in place at /home/user/Documents/plugin_test.kra.

verification.description: Ten Brushes plugin enabled in kritarc [python]
